comment.body:
PERSONAL ANNOUNCEMENT
I won’t work on May 24-26 (no weekly, no Monday post. If I see update, I will post it in short in the chat, but I won’t be at the desk)
And July 24 - Aug 1

And on this Tuesday - Wednesday window, I will have less time to write, so the daily market analysis will be thinner. You will need to stand, read the datas and a bit more on your own. Context is provided.

comment.body:
As said on the weekend: heavy data, Fed decisions, and earnings coming up, we'll see a quick pullback today, followed by a bounce I'll buy into, on this week, and using that to scale into cheap puts. 
Signaled yesterday. 
Again: today and tomorrow I cannot be here to signal real time. Plan is shared. 
Be mindful. 
Probability is high for this scenario, but not 100%

comment.body:
Alma's primal target hit for the VIX. Interesting how VIX is reacting once it hits that gap. 

Also, a sell signal hit on Alma's Vol Based Momentum indicator for the SPX 2 hr chart (20 period, 2 std dev) at the EOD yesterday. Last 3 times this signal hit, there was at least a 200 point pullback.
